original_snippet_context: Report on the financial status and actions related to the exchange rate, likely during a period of inconvertible paper money.
relevant_quote: Representou: «Os melhores prophetas asseguram que não ha saldo e nós vamos além, mantendo a prophecia de que ha saldo.»
justification: The text describes speculation about the financial results related to exchange rate management (cambio), without expressing a clear stance on the Caixa de Conversão or related monetary policies. The mention of "saldo" is likely related to the management of funds influencing the exchange rate.
